sections.paragraph:
only in pl. גְּדִילִים m. intertwined threads, twisted work, see the Root No. 1. (Chald. גְּדִילָא thread, cord; Syr. ܓܕ̈ܘܽܠܶ plaited locks; Arab. جَدِيلُ a rein of plaited thongs). Used-

(1) of the fringes (צִיצִת) which were according to the law to be made on the borders of garments, Deu 22:12.

(2) festoons on the capitals of columns; 1 K. 7:17 .
